hi.title: ट्वेंटी वन पायलट्स - ड्रैग पाथ (आधिकारिक वीडियो)
hi.description:
"ड्रैग पाथ" का आधिकारिक वीडियो अब उपलब्ध है।

स्ट्रीम "ड्रैग पाथ": https://top.lnk.to/DragPath

लेखक, निर्देशक, स्टोरीबोर्ड: टोबियास गुंडोर्फ बोसेन
एनिमेशन: कैटरीन पॉल्सेन, टोबियास गुंडोर्फ बोसेन, फ्रेडरिक विल्लुम्सेन, क्रिस्टोफ़ पेलादान
कला निर्देशन और डिज़ाइन: टोबियास गुंडोर्फ बोसेन
लीड फ़ोटोग्राफ़ी और लाइट: एंड्रियास बर्ग, मार्टिन बेस्टेड
फ़ोटोग्राफ़ी, लाइट: टोबियास गुंडोर्फ बोसेन, एमिल टविलम टॉफ़्ट
चरित्र विकास: टोबियास गुंडोर्फ बोसेन, कैटरीन पॉल्सेन, फ्रेडरिक विल्लुम्सेन
स्टॉप मोशन पपेट्स: टोबियास गुंडोर्फ बोसेन, कैटरीन पॉल्सन
कठपुतली सहायक: हिरोमी सिंटू, जैकब कौशोल्ट
ग्रिप, आर्मेचर, प्रॉप्स: गर्ट गुंडोर्फ, टोबियास गुंडोर्फ बोसेन
कॉस्ट्यूमियर: बिरगिट कौशोल्ट
छाल कॉस्ट्यूमियर: माजकेन जैकबसेन
संपादन, कंपोज़िटिंग, वीएफएक्स: टोबियास गुंडोर्फ बोसेन
रंग: टोबियास गुंडोर्फ बोसेन, मार्टिन बेस्टेड, एंड्रियास बर्ग
फ़ॉले, ध्वनि डिज़ाइन: थॉमस अहलमार्क
कहानी पर्यवेक्षक: टॉड पोल्सन
स्टॉप मोशन सुपरवाइज़र, स्टेज जादूगर: क्रिस्टोफ़ पेलादान
तकनीकी पर्यवेक्षक: सुनीथ पारेख गाइहेडे
कठपुतली सलाहकार: हन्ना हैबरमैन, अंजा पर्ल
तकनीकी सहायता: स्वेन्ड नॉर्डबी, थॉमस अहलमार्क, जेप्पे लिंडस्ट्रॉम, थॉमस क्रिस्टेंसन, हेनरिक एडोल्फसेन
निर्माता: मिशेल नार्डोन
सहायक निर्माता: कैटरीन टॉक्स, हेनरिक माल्मग्रेन
एनिमेशन वर्कशॉप में निर्मित: एनीमेशनवर्कशॉप.विया.डीके

ट्वेंटी वन पायलट्स की अधिक आधिकारिक सामग्री के लिए सदस्यता लें: https://top.lnk.to/subscribe

snippet.title: Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 (FULL GAME)
snippet.description:
Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Full Gameplay Walkthrough with Thinknoodles of Poppy Playtime Chapter 5. This video is the full Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Ending, Broken Things. This is Poppy Playtime's biggest and most terrifying chapter yet, facing off against the Prototype and Huggy Wuggy. In this chilling new layer of the Playtime facility, you will encounter the tortured denizens living in the darkness. New hands permit new and creative ways to explore with a new Grabpack. The Prototype's face will finally be revealed. LWill you escape this new realm of shadows with your sanity intact, or will you succumb to the horrors within?
🍜 SUBSCRIBE - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UChd1FPXykD4pust3ljzq6hQ?sub_confirmation=1
👉 BECOME A MEMBER - https://www.youtube.com/thinknoodles/join
🤖 Discord: https://discord.gg/thinknoodles

Face off against the deadly puppetmaster behind the horrifying events of Playtime Co.

In the latest terrifying chapter of the Poppy Playtime saga (Chapter 5), you are propelled further into the gruesome depths of the factory, with Playtime’s security system Huggy Wuggy in hot pursuit. 

Abandoned by your only allies, your fight for survival gets all the more challenging as you race further into the abyss that is His domain. 

Here, shadows whisper, and the puppet master who lords over this realm pulls the strings of madness. Can you stand against evil and finally put an end to this nightmare? Every bloody move forward will test your resolve as you uncover secrets years in the making.

Features:

Stomach-churning terrors await you in this new section of the factory as you uncover the dark works hidden within The Prototype’s stomping grounds.

In this chilling new layer of the Playtime facility, you will encounter the tortured denizens living in the darkness. They may aid you in your quest to defeat The Prototype, but can they be trusted? 

Solve devious puzzles and overcome dangerous environmental obstacles with the power of new GrabPack tools and functionality.

As you reach the true rotten heart at the center of Playtime, you will discover some of the company’s gravest sins.

Will you escape this new realm of shadows with your sanity intact, or will you succumb to the horrors within?

Chapters 📚
00:00:00 Cinematic Opening & Chapter 5 Start
00:03:12 Huggy Wuggy Chase Tutorial Escape
00:30:28 Meeting Giblet
00:32:43 First Prototype Encounter
00:41:55 Bron & GrabPack 3.0
00:45:40 New Pressure Hand
00:57:56 Limon Easter Egg
01:09:16 Meeting Chum Chompkins
01:22:31 Magnetic Bracelets
01:36:09 Prototype Returns
01:53:47 Huggy Memory: “I’ve Always Been a Toy”
02:07:53 Blue VHS Tape
02:14:36 Playing As Huggy Wuggy
02:25:24 Entering Sweet Street
02:33:56 Meeting Lily Lovebraids
02:35:57 Finding Kissy Missy & Poppy
03:03:18 Prototype Face Reveal
03:30:23 Huggy & Kissy Reunion

snippet.title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
For dust you are. #LeeCroninsTheMummy only in theaters April 17.

Hot off the record-setting resurrection of EVIL DEAD RISE, writer/director Lee Cronin turns to one of the most iconic horror stories of all time with an audacious and twisted retelling: LEE CRONIN’S THE MUMMY.

The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace— eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as what should be a joyful reunion turns into a living nightmare.

The film stars Jack Reynor, Laia Costa, May Calamawy, Natalie Grace, with Veronica Falcón. The film is written and directed by Cronin, and produced by James Wan, Jason Blum and John Keville. The executive producers are Michael Clear, Judson Scott, Macdara Kelleher and Lee Cronin.

Cronin is supported behind the camera by a team of sterling film artisans, including director of photography Dave Garbett, production designer Nick Bassett, editor Bryan Shaw, costume designer Joanna Eatwell, music by Stephen McKeon and casting by Terri Taylor and Sarah Domeier Lindo.

New Line Cinema, Atomic Monster and Blumhouse Present, A Wicked/Good Production, A Lee Cronin Film: LEE CRONIN’S THE MUMMY. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on April 17, 2026, and internationally beginning 15 April 2026.

snippet.title: Poppy Playtime: Chapter 5 (FULL GAME)
snippet.description:
Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 is the latest installment in the Poppy Playtime series. In this chapter of Poppy Playtime we venture deeper than ever before into the depths of the Playtime facility and encounter allies and enemies both new and familiar. This is a full playthrough of Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 and includes the ending of the game. 

Check out Poppy Playtime here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/4100940/?snr=1_5_9__205

You've been watching SuperHorrorBro Mike. If you enjoyed this video remember to like, comment and subscribe for more horror related content. 

Outro music by Kevin MacLeod: https://incompetech.com/

snippet.title: U2 - American Obituary (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
‘American Obituary’ lyric video from U2’s ‘Days Of Ash EP’

Listen to ‘Days Of Ash EP' : https://U2.lnk.to/DOAEPID

Subscribe to the U2 channel: https://U2.lnk.to/YTSubscribeID 
Watch more U2 videos: https://U2.lnk.to/WatchMoreID 

Sign up to the U2 mailing list: https://U2.lnk.to/MailingListID 

Follow U2 on… 
Official Website: https://U2.lnk.to/WebsiteID
Instagram: https://U2.lnk.to/InstagramID 
Facebook: https://U2.lnk.to/FacebookID
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@u2
Twitter: https://U2.lnk.to/TwitterID 

Video produced by F That. https://f-th.at

Lyrics:
You have the right to remain silent 
or not… 
 
God above a mother's love
A guiding hand to pick you up
To crush her like a coffee cup
Why?
Crossing guard or yellow bus 
Our children teach us who to trust 
The worst can’t kill what’s best in us 
But they can try 
America will rise 
Against the people of the lie 
 
I love you more 
Than hate loves war 
I love you more 
Than hate loves war
(War, war) 
 
We love you more than hate loves war 
 
Renee Good born to die free
American mother of three
Seventh day January
A bullet for each child, you see
The color of her eye
930 Minneapolis 
To desecrate domestic bliss
Three bullets blast, three babies kissed
Renee the domestic terrorist???
What you can’t kill can't die
America will rise 
Against the people of the lie 
I love you more 
Than hate loves war 
I love you more 
Than hate loves war 
(War, war)

We love you more than hate loves war 
 
I am not mad at you, Lord 
You’re the reason I was there 
Could you stop a heart from breaking
By having it not care?
Could you stop a bullet in midair?

She says…
The power of the people is so much stronger than the people in power
The power of the people is so much stronger than the people in power
The power of the people is so much stronger than the people in power
 
In the streets with children playing 
In the churches where they’re praying 
School teachers are explaining 
America, America 
The power of the people! 

We love you more (we say, we say) than hate loves war 
I love you more (I say, I say) than hate loves war 

#U2 #AmericanObituary #DaysOfAshEP
tags: U2 I still haven't found what I'm looking for

snippet.title: Avengers: Infinity War
snippet.description: Iron Man, Thor, the Hulk and the rest of the Avengers unite to battle their most powerful enemy yet -- the evil Thanos. On a mission to collect all six Infinity Stones, Thanos plans to use the artifacts to inflict his twisted will on reality. The fate of the planet and existence itself has never been more uncertain as everything the Avengers have fought for has led up to this moment.

snippet.title: PLAYING POPPY PLAYTIME CHAPTER 5... (Full Game + Crazy Ending)
snippet.description:
Merch: https://creatorink.co/57e

Become Part of the Dakpack: http://subscribe.dakblake.com/
Post Memes: https://www.reddit.com/r/dakblake/
Follow me on Tik Tok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dakblaketiktok
Watch this next: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vA7jwDmTMVw&list=PLBAutaS7oxOHYuS4ACsPhFvp304kV9Apk

PLAYING POPPY PLAYTIME CHAPTER 5... (Full Game + Crazy Ending)

What’s up MA DUDES!!!! How is it going today? Today we are going to be playing the FULL GAME of POPPY PLAYTIME CHAPTER 5!!! Yup, today is the day we get to meet the Prototype. We get to see all the new characters like Lily Lovebraids, Chum, Giblet, and more! We are going to see if we can discover secrets, break the game, and make our own funny moments along the way! Maybe we can even try to find some secret endings! But oh boy, this ending we get is already INSANE! I can’t wait to see what happens when we mod the game and add our own stuff! Join me on this amazing and exciting adventure as we discover what happens when we play POPPY PLAYTIME CHAPTER 5!!! Enjoy.
#dakblake #poppyplaytime #poppyplaytimechapter5

Check out Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/4100940/Poppy_Playtime__Chapter_5/

Edited by: @FrazzzYT 

 👉 Twitter 👈 : https://twitter.com/dakblake

📹 Instagram 📹: https://www.instagram.com/dakblake_/

Songs by Kevin Macleod

Ending: Back Again by LEMMiNO

snippet.title: NBA 2K26 | Season 5 Trailer
snippet.description:
Class is in session 🎓

We’re already prepping for Freshman year starting early 2027, but we aren’t making you wait to hit the hardwood. We’re bringing the collegiate spirit to Season 5 starting this Friday! 

Look out all Season long for new college-themed content in both MyCAREER and MyTEAM, including player cards, jerseys, mascots, and more from 16 powerhouse universities!

Full breakdown in the Season 5 Courtside Report, and more to come in 2027 📚 ➡️ https://2kgam.es/3OMUQt7

snippet.title: Bruno Mars - I Just Might (Live at the 68th Annual Grammy Awards)
snippet.description:
Bruno Mars - I Just Might (Live at the 68th Annual Grammy Awards)

The Romantic – the new album from Bruno Mars, available February 27. Pre-order now: https://brunomars.lnk.to/TheRomantic

Stream "I Just Might": https://brunomars.lnk.to/IJustMight

Lyrics: 
You stepped inside with a vibe I ain’t never seen

I just might, I just might make her my baby
I just might make her my baby

me)

good as she look right now ( oh oh oh)

This the part where you break it all the way down down down down
This the part where I turn you all the way around round round round
Put some spirit in it put your heart into
That’s all I need (And if I like what I see you’re coming home with me)
Hey Mr DJ (oh oh oh)
Play a song for this pretty little lady (oh oh oh)

I just might, I just might make her my baby
I just might make her my baby
I just might I just might

Directed by: Daniel Ramos & Bruno Mars
Choreography by: Phil Tayag & Bruno Mars
DP: Todd Banhazl
VFX: Jo Murayama 
Producer: Jeremy Sullivan

Join Bruno’s mailing list: https://drop.cobrand.com/d/BrunoMars/Subscribe

Shop Bruno’s official store: https://brunomars.lnk.to/officialstore

Connect with Bruno: 
https://www.tiktok.com/@brunomars
https://www.instagram.com/brunomars
https://www.youtube.com/brunomars
https://x.com/brunomars
https://www.facebook.com/brunomars

https://brunomars.com

Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMY®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for “Die with a Smile” with Lady Gaga and “APT.” with ROSÉ, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010’s “Just the Way You Are”). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY® Awards (including “Album of the Year” for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.

#BrunoMars #IJustMight #OfficialMusicVideo

Hey Mr DJ (oh oh oh)

https://brunomars.com

Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMY®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for “Die with a Smile” with Lady Gaga and “APT.” with ROSÉ, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010’s “Just the Way You Are”). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY® Awards (including “Album of the Year” for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.

#BrunoMars #IJustMight #OfficialMusicVideo

snippet.title: JOHN WICK CHAPTER 5 - First Trailer (2026) Keanu Reeves | Lionsgate
snippet.description:
— Attention Viewers ⚠️
— This is a Fan-Made Concept Trailer for:
— JOHN WICK CHAPTER 5

— This video is a fan-made concept trailer, created solely for artistic and entertainment purposes.The goal behind this trailer is to showcase my creativity and storytelling skills through a concept trailer based on a unique and original idea. By combining various effects, sound design, and AI technologies, I’ve crafted a cinematic experience that reimagines familiar worlds in bold and imaginative ways. This trailer is not official and is intended to entertain, inspire, and engage with the YouTube community. Thank you for your support — now let’s dive into a world shaped by creativity and craft. 🎬✨

— In this concept trailer for John Wick Chapter 5, the legendary assassin’s fragile peace is revealed to be an illusion as a new and deeply personal threat forces him out of hiding and back into a world that has begun to change without him. With the High Table no longer the central power yet still casting a long shadow, shifting alliances and buried loyalties reshape the underworld, drawing Winston and the Bowery King into a conflict defined by consequence rather than vengeance. Old enemies become uneasy partners, familiar codes lose their authority, and the rise of a singular, dangerous force challenges the balance that once governed every contract and every life. As John confronts the tragedy of a destiny that denies him rest, the story moves toward a final reckoning that binds past and future together, while quietly positioning a new generation and a broader mythology to carry the franchise forward.

—  Subscribe to Teaser Universe 🎬
—  For inquiries: teaseruniverse@gmail.com 📩

#johnwick #keanureeves #johnwickmovie

snippet.description:
Official The Mandalorian & Grogu Movie Trailer 2026 | More ➤ https://KinoCheck.com/App | Pedro Pascal Movie Trailer | Cinema: 22 May 2026 | Details ➤ https://KinoCheck.com/movie/g3e/the-mandalorian-and-grogu-2026?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=description
With "The Mandalorian & Grogu", two of the most popular characters in the Star Wars universe are returning to the big screen for the first time in 2026. The movie not only marks the return of the saga to the cinema after a break of several years, but also continues the story of Din Djarin and Grogu - also known as "Baby Yoda".

The Mandalorian & Grogu (2026) is the new science fiction movie starring Pedro Pascal, Sigourney Weaver and Jeremy Allen White.

snippet.title: Imperfect Women — Official Trailer | Apple TV
snippet.description:
Nothing stays secret forever. Elisabeth Moss, Kerry Washington & Kate Mara are your Imperfect Women, streaming March 18 on Apple TV https://apple.co/_ImperfectWomen

A new series starring Elisabeth Moss, Kerry Washington, and Kate Mara. 

Based on Araminta Hall’s novel of the same name, “Imperfect Women” examines a crime that shatters the lives of three women in a decades-long friendship. The unconventional thriller explores guilt and retribution, love and betrayal, and the compromises we make that irrevocably alter our lives. As the investigation unravels, so does the truth about how even the closest friendships may not be what they seem.

The ensemble cast starring alongside Emmy Award winners Moss and Washington includes Kate Mara (“House of Cards,” “The Martian”), Joel Kinnaman (“For All Mankind”), Corey Stoll (“House of Cards”), Leslie Odom Jr. (“Hamilton,” “Central Park”), Audrey Zahn (“Wildcat”), Jill Wagner (“Special Ops: Lioness”), Rome Flynn (“With Love”), Sheryl Lee Ralph (“Abbott Elementary”), Violette Linnz (“Winning Time: The Rise of the Lakers Dynasty“), Indiana Elle (“The Housemaid”), Jackson Kelly (“The Pitt”), Keith Carradine (“Madam Secretary”), Ana Ortiz (“Ugly Betty”) and Wilson Bethel (“All Rise”).

Subscribe to Apple TV’s YouTube channel: https://apple.co/AppleTVYouTube

Follow Apple TV:
Instagram: https://instagram.com/AppleTV
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@AppleTV
Facebook: https://facebook.com/AppleTV
X: https://X.com/AppleTV
Giphy: https://giphy.com/AppleTV

More from Apple TV: https://apple.co/32qgOEJ

Apple TV is a streaming service with original stories from the most creative minds in TV and film. Watch now on the Apple TV app: https://apple.co/_AppleTVapp Subscription required for Apple TV

#ImperfectWomen #Trailer #AppleTV

snippet.title: Honest Trailers | Zootopia 2
snippet.description:
Channel your deepest fursona, it’s time for the Honest Trailer for Zootopia 2! The franchise that mixes Old MacDonald Had a Farm with structural racism! If you’re into that, and always wondered what it’d be like to hire every single person off Cameo, then you’ll love ZooTwoPia! (Or is it Twotopia?) 

Voice Narration: Jon Bailey the EPIC VOICE GUY (@epicvoiceguy on all socials)
Title Design: Robert Holtby
Written by: Spencer Gilbert and Lon Harris
Produced by: Spencer Gilbert
Edited by: Kevin Williamsen
Post-Production Manager: Emin Bassavand
Manager, Video Operations: Tiffany Tse
Post-Production Specialist: Rebecca Castaneda
VP Content: Max Dionne

#honesttrailers #honest #entertainment #parody #trailer #zootopia #disney

snippet.title: DEATH AWAITS | Marathon Gameplay Trailer
snippet.description:
Scavenge the lost colony of Tau Ceti IV in the survival extraction FPS from the creators of Halo and Destiny.  

Marathon releases March 5, 2026.  

Play Marathon in the Server Slam weekend from February 26, 2026 to March 2, 2026. This open preview weekend* is available worldwide on Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S with cross-play and cross-save.

Learn more: https://www.bungie.net/7/en/News/Article/marathon-server-slam

Pre-order Marathon now:
Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3065800/Marathon/
PlayStation 5: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marathon/
Xbox Series X|S: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9p8mgmxndv9b

Follow Marathon:
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@marathonthegame
Instagram: https://instagram.com/marathonthegame
Twitter: https://x.com/marathonthegame
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/marathonthegame.bungie.net
Discord: https://discord.gg/marathonthegame

Infil into the dark sci-fi world of Tau Ceti IV: A derelict colony rife with rival Runners, hostile UESC security forces, and unpredictable environments. Play with your crew, as a solo Runner, or form uneasy alliances with proximity chat. Scavenge, buildcraft, and take on greater challenges–culminating with the derelict Marathon ship hanging above.

*Gameplay requires internet access and paid-for subscription on console (sold separately)

snippet.title: Eros Ramazzotti - Otra Como Tú (Letra)
snippet.description:
Eros Ramazzotti - Otra Como Tú (Letra)
Eros Ramazzotti - Otra Como Tú (Lyrics)
Eros Ramazzotti - Otra Como Tú (Subtitulada)

→No olvides seguir a Eros Ramazzotti:
🎵 Spotify:
https://open.spotify.com/playlist/1dqygY6F7s0JAjmMr8CFxx

→Lyrics:
[Verso 1]
No puede haber, ¿Dónde la encontraría?
Otra mujer igual que tú
No puede haber (Desgracia semejante), desgracia semejante (Otra, otra mujer)
Otra mujer (Desgracia semejante), igual que tú

[Verso 2]
Con iguales emociones, con las expresiones
Que en otra sonrisa no vería yo
Con esa mirada atenta a mi indiferencia
Cuando me salía de la situación
Con la misma fantasía, la capacidad
De aguantar el ritmo despiadado, oh
De mí mal humor, eh-ah, uh-oh

[Coro]
Otra no puede haber
Si no existe, me la inventaré
Parece claro que
Aún estoy envenenado de ti

[Post-Coro]
Es la cosa más evidente

[Verso 3]
Y me faltan cada noche todas tus manías
Aunque más enormes eran, sí, las mías
Y me faltan tus miradas, porque sé que están allí
Donde yo las puse, apasionadas, oh
Justo sobre ti, lala-oh
Parece claro

snippet.title: The Mandalorian and Grogu Official Trailer Reaction | So UNNECESSARY!
snippet.description:
The Mandalorian is back… but this time, Disney decided to turn it into a full theatrical movie. I just watched the brand-new Mandalorian & Grogu trailer, and honestly?
Something feels off. What made Mando work was the episodic structure — the slower character moments, the side quests, the TV pacing. But this trailer already feels like Disney is trying to force a streaming story into a blockbuster event, and I’m not convinced it’s going to work.
For more SnarkyJay...
Consider subscribing to my Patreon!: https://bit.ly/3MUrd6h
Follow me on Instagram: https://bit.ly/3GTPNjY

it.title: Reazione al trailer ufficiale di The Mandalorian e Grogu | Davvero INUTILE!
it.description:
The Mandalorian è tornato... ma questa volta la Disney ha deciso di trasformarlo in un film completo per il cinema. Ho appena visto il nuovissimo trailer di The Mandalorian & Grogu, e onestamente?
C'è qualcosa che non va. Ciò che ha fatto funzionare The Mandalorian è stata la struttura episodica: i momenti più lenti dei personaggi, le missioni secondarie, il ritmo televisivo. Ma questo trailer sembra già che la Disney stia cercando di forzare una storia in streaming in un evento di successo, e non sono convinto che funzionerà.
Per altro da SnarkyJay...
Considerate di iscrivervi al mio Patreon!: https://bit.ly/3MUrd6h
Seguitemi su Instagram: https://bit.ly/3GTPNjY

pt-BR.title: Reação ao trailer oficial de The Mandalorian e Grogu | Tão DESNECESSÁRIO!
pt-BR.description:
O Mandaloriano está de volta… mas desta vez, a Disney decidiu transformá-lo em um filme para o cinema. Acabei de assistir ao novo trailer de Mandalorian & Grogu e, sinceramente?
Tem algo estranho. O que fez Mando funcionar foi a estrutura episódica — os momentos mais lentos dos personagens, as missões secundárias, o ritmo de série de TV. Mas este trailer já dá a impressão de que a Disney está tentando forçar uma história de streaming a se tornar um blockbuster, e não estou convencido de que vai funcionar.

Para mais conteúdo do SnarkyJay...
Considere se inscrever no meu Patreon!: https://bit.ly/3MUrd6h
Siga-me no Instagram: https://bit.ly/3GTPNjY

es-US.title: Reacción al tráiler oficial de The Mandalorian y Grogu | ¡TAN INNECESARIO!
es-US.description:
El Mandaloriano ha vuelto… pero esta vez, Disney decidió convertirlo en una película completa. Acabo de ver el nuevo tráiler de El Mandaloriano y Grogu, ¿y la verdad?
Algo no encaja. Lo que hizo que El Mandaloriano funcionara fue la estructura episódica: los momentos más lentos de los personajes, las misiones secundarias, el ritmo televisivo. Pero este tráiler ya da la sensación de que Disney está intentando convertir una historia de streaming en un éxito de taquilla, y no estoy convencido de que vaya a funcionar.
Para más de SnarkyJay...
¡Considera suscribirte a mi Patreon!: https://bit.ly/3MUrd6h
Sígueme en Instagram: https://bit.ly/3GTPNjY

hi.title: द मैंडलोरियन और ग्रोगू के आधिकारिक ट्रेलर पर प्रतिक्रिया | बिलकुल अनावश्यक!
hi.description:
द मैंडलोरियन वापस आ गया है... लेकिन इस बार, डिज़्नी ने इसे एक पूरी तरह से थिएटर फिल्म बनाने का फैसला किया है। मैंने अभी-अभी बिल्कुल नया मैंडलोरियन और ग्रोगू ट्रेलर देखा, और सच कहूँ तो?
कुछ गड़बड़ लग रही है। मैंडो की सफलता का राज उसकी एपिसोडिक संरचना थी - किरदारों के धीमे-धीमे आगे बढ़ने के पल, साइड मिशन, और टीवी की तरह धीमी गति। लेकिन यह ट्रेलर देखकर ऐसा लग रहा है कि डिज़्नी एक स्ट्रीमिंग कहानी को जबरदस्ती ब्लॉकबस्टर इवेंट बनाने की कोशिश कर रहा है, और मुझे यकीन नहीं है कि यह कामयाब होगा।
और भी स्नार्कीजे के लिए...
मेरे पैट्रियन को सब्सक्राइब करें!: https://bit.ly/3MUrd6h
मुझे इंस्टाग्राम पर फॉलो करें: https://bit.ly/3GTPNjY

fr-FR.title: Réaction à la bande-annonce officielle de The Mandalorian et Grogu | Tellement INUTILE !
fr-FR.description:
Le Mandalorien est de retour… mais cette fois, Disney a décidé d'en faire un long métrage. Je viens de regarder la toute nouvelle bande-annonce de The Mandalorian & Grogu, et honnêtement ?

Il y a quelque chose qui cloche. Le succès de Mando résidait dans sa structure épisodique : les moments plus intimistes avec les personnages, les quêtes annexes, le rythme d'une série télé. Mais cette bande-annonce donne déjà l'impression que Disney essaie de transformer une histoire initialement conçue pour le streaming en un blockbuster, et je ne suis pas convaincu que ça fonctionnera.

Pour plus de SnarkyJay…

Pensez à vous abonner à mon Patreon ! : https://bit.ly/3MUrd6h

Suivez-moi sur Instagram : https://bit.ly/3GTPNjY

id.title: Reaksi terhadap Trailer Resmi The Mandalorian dan Grogu | Sangat TIDAK PERLU!
id.description:
The Mandalorian kembali… tapi kali ini, Disney memutuskan untuk mengubahnya menjadi film layar lebar. Saya baru saja menonton trailer terbaru Mandalorian & Grogu, dan jujur ​​saja?

Ada yang terasa janggal. Yang membuat Mando berhasil adalah struktur episodiknya — momen-momen karakter yang lebih lambat, misi sampingan, dan tempo seperti serial TV. Tapi trailer ini sudah terasa seperti Disney mencoba memaksakan cerita streaming menjadi sebuah acara blockbuster, dan saya tidak yakin itu akan berhasil.
Untuk lebih banyak tulisan SnarkyJay...
Pertimbangkan untuk berlangganan Patreon saya!: https://bit.ly/3MUrd6h
Ikuti saya di Instagram: https://bit.ly/3GTPNjY

de-DE.title: Reaktion auf den offiziellen Trailer zu „The Mandalorian“ und Grogu | Völlig unnötig!
de-DE.description:
Der Mandalorianer ist zurück… aber dieses Mal hat Disney beschlossen, daraus einen richtigen Kinofilm zu machen. Ich habe mir gerade den brandneuen Trailer zu „The Mandalorian & Grogu“ angesehen, und ehrlich gesagt? Irgendwas stimmt da nicht. Was „The Mandalorian“ so gut gemacht hat, war die episodische Struktur – die ruhigeren Momente mit den Charakteren, die Nebenquests, das typische TV-Tempo. Aber dieser Trailer wirkt schon jetzt so, als ob Disney versucht, eine Streaming-Story in ein Blockbuster-Event zu pressen, und ich bin nicht überzeugt, dass das funktionieren wird.

Mehr von SnarkyJay…
Abonniert meinen Patreon!: https://bit.ly/3MUrd6h
Folgt mir auf Instagram: https://bit.ly/3GTPNjY

snippet.title: Fuerza Regida - TU SANCHO (LETRA)
snippet.description:
🍺 Si te gustó la rola, no olvides suscribirte, dejar tu like y compartirla con los compas.

🍻 Sobre la canción / el video:
Tu Sancho es un corrido moderno que mezcla despecho, orgullo y confrontación directa. Con el estilo característico de Fuerza Regida, la canción aborda la traición desde una postura segura y desafiante, usando el término “sancho” como símbolo de conflicto amoroso.

El tema mantiene la esencia del regional mexicano actual, con una energía intensa y una narrativa cruda que conecta con el público que vive historias de desamor, celos y orgullo herido.

📲 Redes sociales del artista:
🔗 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fuerzaregida/

🔗 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/fuerzaregida

🔗 YouTube Oficial: https://www.youtube.com/@FUERZAREGIDAOfficialArtistChannel

🎧 Escúchala en plataformas:
🔗 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/search/Tu%20Sancho%20Fuerza%20Regida

🔗 Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/search?term=Tu%20Sancho%20Fuerza%20Regida

🔗 YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/search?q=Tu+Sancho+Fuerza+Regida

🔗 Amazon Music: https://music.amazon.com/search/Tu%20Sancho%20Fuerza%20Regida

📝 Lyrics:
Mi niña alista tu maleta ahorita
Quiero que te pongas bonita
Ya le marqué al pinche piloto
Ya dile al tonto que ya te vas
Cabrona, buena pa' mentiras
Y esa boquita me fascina
Baby, tú eres para un loco
Y como este loco no hay como yo
Qué bonito chingarte en las nubes, bandida
El piloto pura verga baja la mira
Terminamos en treinta y llegamos a Ibiza
Aterrizamos sin prisa
Materiales son los que tú menos pedías
Los detalles enamoraron a mi niña
Hoy quedé con la cuenta de banco en la cima
Tú date vuelo
Ah, ah, uh
Qué bonita te miras, bien mamacita sin calzón
No le cuentes a tu amiga que la tengo como león
Calladita te ves más bonita
Pa' mirarnos otra vez, que no lo sepa tu güey
Sin pedos te espero, peléate con tu güey
Invéntate una razón pa' que no le haga de pedo
Ni pedo, sin pedo, ya qué (eh, eh, eh)
Qué bonito chingarte y más rico y noche
Un palito en el aire y privado pa' Londres
Diferentes mujeres de varios sabores
Nomás no te me aloques
Mujeriego y coqueto, tengo mil amores
De hace tiempo te busco, mas no sé ni en dónde
Si me quieres tendrás que aguantar los rumores
Nomás no te me aloques
Ey
Fuer-za-za-za Regida
#FuerzaRegida #TuSancho #RegionalMexicano #Corridos #CorridosTumbados #MusicaMexicana #Despecho #NuevoRegional

🔗 Amazon Music: https://music.amazon.com/search/Tu%20Sancho%20Fuerza%20Regida

📝 Lyrics:
Mi niña alista tu maleta ahorita
Quiero que te pongas bonita
Ya le marqué al pinche piloto
Ya dile al tonto que ya te vas
Cabrona, buena pa' mentiras
Y esa boquita me fascina
Baby, tú eres para un loco
Y como este loco no hay como yo
Qué bonito chingarte en las nubes, bandida
El piloto pura verga baja la mira
Terminamos en treinta y llegamos a Ibiza
Aterrizamos sin prisa
Materiales son los que tú menos pedías
Los detalles enamoraron a mi niña
Hoy quedé con la cuenta de banco en la cima
Tú date vuelo
Ah, ah, uh
Qué bonita te miras, bien mamacita sin calzón
No le cuentes a tu amiga que la tengo como león
Calladita te ves más bonita
Pa' mirarnos otra vez, que no lo sepa tu güey
Sin pedos te espero, peléate con tu güey
Invéntate una razón pa' que no le haga de pedo
Ni pedo, sin pedo, ya qué (eh, eh, eh)
Qué bonito chingarte y más rico y noche
Un palito en el aire y privado pa' Londres
Diferentes mujeres de varios sabores
Nomás no te me aloques
Mujeriego y coqueto, tengo mil amores
De hace tiempo te busco, mas no sé ni en dónde
Si me quieres tendrás que aguantar los rumores
Nomás no te me aloques
Ey
Fuer-za-za-za Regida
#FuerzaRegida #TuSancho #RegionalMexicano #Corridos #CorridosTumbados #MusicaMexicana #Despecho #NuevoRegional

📼 Artista: FUERZA REGIDA

⏩ Escucha al artista original y apóyalo en sus redes oficiales:
• 📺 YouTube:    www.youtube.com/@UCFLI6KAjrKRtydD7KqiYvAw 

🎥 Video oficial: https://youtu.be/PXSmPTX-SgM?si=_0hodQ2ZIWjp0CYb
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🕹️ Si te gustó este video, suscríbete para no perderte nuevas joyas de todos los tiempos:
📺  www.youtube.com/@SaboraManzana  
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Letra:
Mi niña, alista tu maleta ahorita
Quiero que te pongas bonita
Ya le marqué al pinche piloto
Ya dile al tonto que ya te vas
Cabrona, buena pa mentiras
Y esa boquita me fascina
Baby, tú eres para un loco
Y como este loco, no hay como yo
Qué bonito chingarte en las nubes, bandida
El piloto, pura verga, baja la mira
Terminamos en 30 y llegamos a Ibiza
Aterrizamos sin prisa
Materiales son los que tú menos pedías
Los detalles enamoraron a mi niña
Hoy te dejo una cuenta de banco en las Islas
Tú date vuelo
Qué bonita te miras, mi mamacita, sin calzón
No le cuentes a tu amiga que la tengo como león
Calladita te ves más bonita
Pa mirarnos otra vez, que no lo sepa tu güey
Sin pedos te espero, peléate con tu güey
Invéntate una razón pa que no le haga de pedo
Ni pedo, sin pedo, ¿ya qué?
Eh, eh, eh, eh
Qué bonito chingarte, más rico y de noche
Un palito en el aire y privado pa Londres
Diferentes mujeres de varios sabores
Nomás no te me aloques
Mujeriego y coqueto, tengo mil amores
De hace tiempo te busco, mas no sé ni en dónde
Si me quieres, tendrás que aguantar los rumores
Nomás no te me aloques
Fuer-za-za-za Re-
Ja, ja, ja

snippet.title: Chayanne - Yo Te Amo (Letra)
snippet.description:
🎵Chayanne - Yo Te Amo (Letra)

⇨ Chayanne
https://open.spotify.com/track/7lOzUJzsELALh5FQsPKTEn?autoplay=true
https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=PQ2CMsUwEdk&feature=gws_kp_track
https://music.apple.com/ar/album/humanos-a-marte/903386393?i=903386401 

⇨ Escucha Nuestra Playlist de Spotify! :
https://open.spotify.com/playlist/7iUQLvlRuKvVdZ1yDhmH6H?si=19a494afbd454b8c
⇨ Escucha Nuestra Playlist de Youtube! :
https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLzUy9qQrjQ34Cy6LskeRlvu4sTBYhkBUw&si=GbkIvDRRAN_fLth4

🔔 Activa las notificaciones para enterarte de los vídeos nuevos!

Espero que te haya gustado nuestro video!

Letra :
En palabras simples y comunes, yo te extraño
En lenguaje terrenal, mi vida eres tú
En total simplicidad, sería yo te amo
Y, en un trozo de poesía, tú serás mi luz, mi bien

El espacio donde me alimento de tu piel, que es bondad
La fuerza que me mueve dentro para recomenzar
Y en tu cuerpo encontrar la paz

Si la vida me permite al lado tuyo
Crecerán mis ilusiones, no lo dudo
Y si la vida la perdiera en un instante
Que me llene de ti
Para amar después de amarte, vida

No tengas miedos ni dudas (que este amor es demasiado bueno)
Que tú serás mi mujer (yo te pertenezco todo, entero)
Mira mi pecho, lo dejo abierto
Para que vivas en él

Para tu tranquilidad, me tienes en tus manos
Para mi debilidad, la única eres tú
Al final, tan solo sé que siempre te he esperado
Y que llegas a mi vida y tú me das la luz, el bien

Ese mundo donde tus palabras hacen su voluntad
La magia de este sentimiento que es tan fuerte y total
Y tus ojos que son mi paz

Si la vida me permite al lado tuyo
Crecerán mis ilusiones, no lo dudo
Y si la vida la perdiera en un instante
Que me llene de ti
Para amar después de amarte, vida

No tengas miedos ni dudas (que este amor es demasiado bueno)
Que tú serás mi mujer (yo te pertenezco todo, entero)
Mira mi pecho, lo dejo abierto
Para que vivas en él

No tengas miedos ni dudas (que este amor es demasiado bueno)
Que tú serás mi mujer (yo te pertenezco todo, entero)
Mira mi pecho, lo dejo abierto
Para que vivas en él

No tengas miedos ni dudas (que este amor es demasiado bueno)
Que tú serás mi mujer (yo te pertenezco todo, entero)
Mira mi pecho, lo dejo abierto

Love 'til the mornin', my head wan' to turn from your lovin'

Gave you all you need, gave you all you need
Gave you all, you give me all you need, give you all you need, gave you all
Make ah give you all you need, every touch you need, give you all
Make ah give you all you need, baby, yeah-yeah, yeah-yeah

[Chorus: Tems & Wizkid]
You don't need no other body
You don't need no other body (Woah, woah, woah)
Only you fi hold my body
Only you fi hold my body (Yeah-yeah, yeah-yeah)
You don't need no other body

snippet.title: Vicente Fernández - La Diferencia (LETRA)
snippet.description:
SUSCRÍBETE Y PRESIONA (🔔) PARA UNIRTE AL EQUIPO DE NOTIFICACIONES Y MANTENERTE ACTUALIZADO CON LOS NUEVOS VIDEOS 

La Diferencia- Vicente Fernández
https://open.spotify.com/intl-es/artist/4PPoI9LuYeFX8V674Z1R6l?si=ef871c7b4f874886&nd=1&dlsi=8a530b75655449db

👇NUESTRAS  REDES SOCIALES 👇
📸 https://www.tiktok.com/@radio.reggeaeton
📸 https://www.instagram.com/radio.reggaeton/
📸 https://www.facebook.com/Reggaeton-y-Trap-679793115555367

▶️ NUEVO CANAL ▶️
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFigkPpo-OEvorncZ20wpWg

LETRA/LYRIC:🎵
Aunque malgastes el tiempo sin mi cariño
Y aunque no quieras este amor que yo te ofrezco
Y aunque no quieras pronunciar mi humilde nombre
De cualquier modo, yo te seguiré queriendo

Yo sé que nunca tú querrás jamás amarme
Que a tu cariño llegué demasiado tarde
No me desprecies, no es mi culpa, no seas mala
Porque tú eres de quien quiero enamorarme

Qué daño puedo hacerte con quererte
Si no me quieres tú, yo te comprendo
Perfectamente sé que no nací yo para ti
Pero qué puedo hacer si ya te quiero

Déjame vivir de esta manera
Yo te quiero tal cual y sin condiciones
Sin esperar que un día tú me quieras como yo
Consciente estoy, mi amor, que nunca me querrás

Talvez mañana yo despierte solo
Pero por el momento quiero estar soñando
No me despiertes tú, ¿no ves que así yo soy feliz?
Consciente estoy, mi amor, que no eres para mí

No hay necesidad que me desprecies
Tú ponte en mi lugar a ver qué harías
La diferencia entre tú y yo, tal vez, sería, corazón
Que yo en tu lugar sí te amaría

TAGS:🎤 
#VicenteFernández #LaDiferencia #LETRA 

📧 Correo Electronico: radioreggaetonproduction@gmail.com

snippet.title: George Michael - Careless Whisper (Sub. Español + Lyrics)
snippet.description:
George Michael - Careless Whisper
Released 10/11/2006

#GeorgeMichael 
#pop 
#soul 

espero que te haya gustado ¡gracias por ver! 💙

canal secundario: https://www.youtube.com/@iamsweeet

¡acá mis redes por si gustas seguirme!
➳ perfil de spotify: https://open.spotify.com/user/qbv420v1r19afqa6y3oxk0sjf?si=d48283bd97384444
➳ instagram: https://www.instagram.com/swext.blue/
➳ tiktok: https://vm.tiktok.com/ZMeRhv2d7/
➳ contáctame: swextblue@gmail.com
➳ https://ko-fi.com/sweetblue
➳ https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/swextblue

lyrics:
oh, oh, oh
oh

i feel so unsure
as i take your hand and lead you to the dance floor
as the music dies, something in your eyes
calls to mind a silver screen
and all its sad goodbyes

i'm never gonna dance again
guilty feet have got no rhythm
though it's easy to pretend
i know you're not a fool

should've known better than to cheat a friend
and waste the chance that i've been given
so i'm never gonna dance again
the way i danced with you, oh, oh

time can never mend
the careless whispers of a good friend
to the heart and mind
ignorance is kind
there's no comfort in the truth
pain is all you'll find

i'm never gonna dance again
guilty feet have got no rhythm
though it's easy to pretend
i know you're not a fool

should've known better than to cheat a friend
and waste this chance that i've been given
so i'm never gonna dance again
the way i danced with you, oh

never without your love

tonight the music seems so loud
i wish that we could lose this crowd
maybe it's better this way
we'd hurt each other with the things we'd want to say

we could have been so good together
we could have lived this dance forever
but now who's gonna dance with me?
please, stay!

and i'm never gonna dance again
guilty feet have got no rhythm
though it's easy to pretend
i know you're not a fool

should've known better than to cheat a friend
and waste the chance that i've been given
so i'm never gonna dance again
the way i danced with you
oh, oh

(now that you're gone) now that you're gone
(now that you're gone) what i did's so wrong, so wrong
that you had to leave me alone

oh, oh
oh, oh
oh, oh
oh, oh
oh, oh
oh

snippet.title: POPPY PLAYTIME CHAPTER 5 - THE DARK TRUTH ABOUT HUGGY WUGGY IS REVEALED
snippet.description:
POPPY PLAYTIME CHAPTER 5 IS HERE!!! Face off against the deadly puppet master behind the horrifying events of Playtime Co.

In the latest terrifying chapter of the Poppy Playtime saga, you are propelled further into the gruesome depths of the factory, with Playtime’s security system Huggy Wuggy in hot pursuit. 

Abandoned by your only allies, your fight for survival gets all the more challenging as you race further into the abyss that is His domain. 

Here, shadows whisper, and the puppet master who lords over this realm pulls the strings of madness. Can you stand against evil and finally put an end to this nightmare? Every bloody move forward will test your resolve as you uncover secrets years in the making.

snippet.title: Carin León, Camilo - Ni Me Debes, Ni Te Debo || Vídeo con letra
snippet.description:
BIENVENIDOS A HOT GRAVITY MUSIC  🌕  SUSCRÍBETE Y PRESIONA (🔔) PARA MANTENERTE AL TANTO CON LOS NUEVOS VÍDEOS LYRICS DEL MOMENTO  🎶

Carin León, Camilo - Ni Me Debes, Ni Te Debo (SPOTIFY)
https://youtu.be/a6Or1V7XUUo?si=kwAt31PYffy4QAAw
https://open.spotify.com/intl-es/track/1393rKYgZHNphZrdx1jWoN

👇NUESTRAS REDES SOCIALES 👇 
📸 https://www.tiktok.com/@radio.reggeaeton 
📸 https://www.instagram.com/radio.regga... 
📸 https://www.facebook.com/Reggaeton-y-... 

LYRIC:
Tengo que irme porque me siento muy triste
Aquí no hay nada, esta historia se acabó
Te dejo libre, fuiste tú la que perdiste
No es tan sencillo encontrarse un gran amor

Te dejo libre, aunque en verdad no quiero irme
Algo me frena, pero sé que no es amor
Es la costumbre a todo lo que me diste
Sea lo que sea, es lo mejor para los dos

Ni me debes ni te debo
Se acabó, nada es eterno
Buena suerte con tu gran amor
Que te salga bien tu nuevo intento

snippet.title: I Made the Worst City Possible in Cities Skylines
snippet.description:
I have made the worst decision possible for every part of my city's design. Traffic is terrible, coverage is terrible, and there are constant disasters.

Watch all my Cities Skylines videos: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLliBvQE3gg9dNVEj6v6iXaTqqrZYwFc7e

- This video was recorded live on my Twitch Channel: http://www.twitch.tv/rtgame
- Subscribe if you'd like to see more! https://www.youtube.com/@RTGame?sub_confirmation=1
- Become a Youtube Member to support me: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRC6cNamj9tYAO6h_RXd5xA/join

- Follow me on Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/rtgame.bsky.social
- Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rtgamecrowd
- Join the RTGame Discord Server: https://discord.gg/rtgame
- Watch my full streams on my Archive Channel: https://www.youtube.com/rtgamestreamarchive
- RTGame Clip Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@RTGameClips

Everything in this video was recorded live on my Twitch Channel. My schedule is Tuesday & Thursday @ 7pm, Saturday & Sunday @ 3pm - all times based in Ireland. 

Edited by Ashtaric (Cloé), you can find her here: https://bsky.app/profile/ashtaric.bsky.social And here: https://www.twitch.tv/ashtaric

Music is Pokemon Black and White - White Forest, Undella Town Summer, White Treehollow, Driftveil City & Accumula Town, Legend of Zelda Wind Waker - Staff Credits & Windfall Island, Stardew Valley - Nature's Crescendo, Wii Sports - Title Screen.

snippet.title: Katy Perry - Wide Awake
snippet.description:
Katy Perry - Wide Awake
Stream/Download:

(Lyrics):
[Intro]
I'm wide awake
I'm wide awake

[Verse 1]
(I'm wide awake)
Yeah, I was in the dark
I was falling hard with an open heart
(I'm wide awake)
How did I read the stars so wrong?
(I'm wide awake)
And now it's clear to me
That everything you see ain't always what it seems
(I'm wide awake)
Yeah, I was dreaming for so long

[Pre-Chorus]
I wish I knew then what I know now
Wouldn't dive in, wouldn't bow down
Gravity hurts, you made it so sweet
'Til I woke up on, on the concrete

[Chorus]
Fallin' from cloud nine
Crashin' from the high
I'm letting go tonight
Yeah, I'm fallin' from cloud nine

[Verse 2]
(I'm wide awake)
Not losing any sleep
I picked up every piece and landed on my feet
(I'm wide awake)
Need nothing to complete myself, no
(I'm wide awake)
Yeah, I am born again
Out of the lion's den, I don't have to pretend
(And it's too late)
The story's over now, the end

[Pre-Chorus]
I wish I knew then what I know now
Wouldn't dive in, wouldn't bow down
Gravity hurts, you made it so sweet
'Til I woke up on, on the concrete

[Chorus]
Fallin' from cloud nine (It was outta the blue, I'm)
Crashin' from the high
I'm letting go tonight (Yeah, I'm letting you go, I'm)
I'm fallin' from cloud nine

[Bridge]
(I'm wide awake)
Thunder rumbling
Castles crumbling (I'm wide awake)
I am tryin' to hold on
(I'm wide awake)
God knows that I tried
Seeing the bright side (I'm wide awake)
But I'm not blind anymore
[Break]
I'm wide awake
I'm wide awake

[Chorus]
Yeah, I'm fallin' from cloud nine (It was outta the blue, I'm)
Crashin' from the high
You know I'm letting go tonight (Yeah, I'm letting you go, I'm)
I'm fallin' from cloud nine

[Outro]
I'm wide awake
I'm wide awake
I'm wide awake
I'm wide awake
I'm wide awake

Tags:
Wide Awake Lyrics
Katy Perry Wide Awake
Wide Awake Katy Perry
Fallin' from cloud nine
Crashin' from the high

snippet.title: Toto - Africa (Traducida al Español)
snippet.description:
¿Buscás música que te acompañe en todos tus momentos? Este canal es para ti. Aquí vas a encontrar canciones que inspiran, emocionan y te hacen vibrar 🙌✨

Si te gusta esta canción, suscribete y activá la campanita para no perderte ninguna novedad 🔔

---

📀 Toto - Africa 📀


⭐ Redes sociales del artista:
Facebook: https://Toto.lnk.to/followFI
Spotify: https://Toto.lnk.to/followSI
Twitter: https://Toto.lnk.to/followTI
Site: https://Toto.lnk.to/followWI
Youtube: https://totoband.lnk.to/subscribeYD
Soundcloud: https://soundcloud.com/toto-official
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/totothemselves
Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/artist/toto/462614


🎤 Lyrics 🎼

Hear the drums echoing tonight
But she hears only whispers of some quiet conversation
She's comin' in, 12:30 flight
Her moonlit wings reflect the stars that guide me towards salvation
I stopped an old man along the way
Hopin' to find some old forgotten words or ancient melodies
He turned to me as if to say
"Hurry, boy, it's waiting there for you"
It's gonna take a lot to drag me away from you
There's nothin' that a hundred men or more could ever do
I bless the rains down in Africa
Gonna take some time to do the things we never had, ooh-hoo
The wild dogs cry out in the night
As they grow restless longing for some solitary company
I know that I must do what's right
Sure as Kilimanjaro rises like Olympus above the Serengeti
I seek to cure what's deep inside
Frightened of this thing that I've become
It's gonna take a lot to drag me away from you
There's nothin' that a hundred men or more could ever do
I bless the rains down in Africa
Gonna take some time to do the things we never had, ooh-hoo
Hurry, boy, she's waiting there for you
It's gonna take a lot to drag me away from you
There's nothin' that a hundred men or more could ever do
I bless the rains down in Africa
I bless the rains down in Africa (I bless the rains)
I bless the rains down in Africa (I bless the rains)
I bless the rains down in Africa
I bless the rains down in Africa (ooh, I'm gonna take the time)
Gonna take some time to do the things we never had, ooh-hoo







💬 Comenta aquí abajo qué te pareció, ¡me encanta leer sus opiniones y recomendaciones! 👇

---

snippet.title: Tyler, The Creator - Thought I Was Dead / Sugar On My Tongue (Live at the 2026 GRAMMYs)
snippet.description:
-build, move, destroy the builder and building-

white folks crashing this down
and yall mad at me yall can suck my dick
pull up old tweets, pull up old t-shirts
all that, ill moonwalk over that bitch
see i changed like the fit got dirty
i was young man then the boy hit 30
i was tripping, but you aint god!
you aint coco guaff you cant serve me
anti black? yeah right
yall running yall mouth, keep it air tight
ill crash this out till my hair white
but yall mind made up, im the bad guy
kumbaya the coon is back
according to you my shoes they tap
how many lives i've changed?
millionaires made?
surprise! the room is black
Loiter Squad with the klan mask
somebody tell him he's not Chappelle
sambo tee like KMD
them edgy points aint age too well
5 in the morning i be hating on shit
10 in the evening i be hating on shit
10 years later might have changed my mind
i'm fake as hell dont kill me
im a hypocrite, aint real, aint really
im a big troll HA HA im silly
the pros and cons, ignore or respond?
defend? or give accountability
all them hot takes got me chilly
shout out papa, he pha real
dont test V he pop for real
had to call him like "stop, chill"
aint no self hate here
confidence been top tier
baby its a brand new year
no walls im backed in
got me running from my ghost im pac-man
*breath*
i know all of this fake
so why am i filled with this hate?
i got freedom in every way
they want to take what i got
but they do not got what it takes
i dont wanna be found ya hoe
i dont wanna be down ya hoe
im not coming around ya hoe
i will not knock knock at ya door
just me, thats what i said
trav' these boys is feds
me? im over here
them boys thought i was dead!!!

snippet.title: The Help
snippet.description: In the 1960s Mississippi, Southern society girl Skeeter returns from college with dreams of being a writer. She turns her small town on its ear by choosing to interview the Black women who have spent their lives taking care of prominent white families. Only Aibileen, the housekeeper of Skeeter's best friend, will talk at first. But as the pair continue the collaboration, more women decide to come forward, and as it turns out, they have quite a lot to say.

snippet.title: Liadrin Animated Short: All That is Sacred | World of Warcraft: Midnight | Story Cinematic
snippet.description:
Hope will dawn again. Throughout her life, Liadrin has had her faith in the Light tested in ways few have endured, but has become the Sunwell’s most stalwart protector throughout her journey of loss, despair, and retribution. Now, in Azeroth’s darkest hour, she stands against the Void, knowing that with the Light by her side, darkness will never prevail.

Now is the time to make your stand.

de.title: Liadrin – Animierter Kurzfilm: Alles, was heilig ist | World of Warcraft: Midnight | Story-Cinematic
de.description:
Hoffnung wird erneut anbrechen. Im Laufe ihres Lebens wurde Liadrins Glaube an das Licht auf eine Weise auf die Probe gestellt, wie es nur wenige ertragen mussten. Dabei wurde sie durch Verlust, Verzweiflung und Vergeltung zur standhaftesten Beschützerin des Sonnenbrunnens. Jetzt, in Azeroths dunkelster Stunde, stellt sie sich der Leere, im Wissen, dass die Dunkelheit niemals siegen wird, solange das Licht ihr besteht.

Jetzt ist es Zeit, sich der Bedrohung zu stellen.

fr.title: Court métrage d’animation de Liadrin : Tout ce qui est sacré | WoW: Midnight | Cinématique
fr.description:
: L’espoir renaîtra encore. Tout au long de la vie de Liadrin, sa foi en la Lumière a été mise à l’épreuve, bien plus que de nombreuses personnes. Pourtant, au fil d’une existence jalonnée de deuil, de désespoir et de vengeance, elle est devenue la plus fidèle protectrice du Puits de soleil. Alors qu’Azeroth est sur le point de connaître son heure la plus sombre, elle se dresse contre le Vide, car elle sait que la Lumière à ses côtés, les ténèbres ne triompheront jamais.

Le moment est venu de prendre les armes.

pt-BR.description:
A esperança nascerá novamente. Ao longo de sua vida, Liadrin teve a fé na Luz posta à prova de formas que poucos suportariam, mas se tornou a mais destemida protetora da Nascente do Sol em sua jornada de perda, desespero e redenção. Agora, na hora mais sombria de Azeroth, ela se ergue contra o Caos, ciente de que, com a Luz ao seu lado, a escuridão jamais prevalecerá.

Chegou a hora de tomar sua posição.

pl.description:
Nadzieja znów się zatli. Życie wielokrotnie poddawało próbom Liadrin i jej wiarę w Światłość. Jednak jako jedna z nielicznych przetrwała tę drogę pełną strat, rozpaczy i zemsty. To uczyniło Liadrin najwierniejszą strażniczką Słonecznej Studni. Teraz ta elfka stawia czoła Pustce w najmroczniejszej godzinie Azeroth. Wiedza, że ma Światłość po swojej stronie pozwala jej ufać, że ciemność nigdy nie zwycięży.

zh-Hant.title: 莉雅德倫短篇動畫：神聖萬物 |《魔獸世界：至暗之夜》| 故事動畫
zh-Hant.description:
希望終將再臨。在莉雅德倫的一生中，她對聖光的信仰多次面臨常人無法承受的考驗，但在經歷過失去、絕望和懲戒後，她最終成為太陽之井最堅定的守護者。如今，在艾澤拉斯最黑暗的時刻，她挺身對抗虛無，深知只要聖光與她同在，黑暗終將落敗。

現在正是挺身而出的時候。

es-ES.title: Corto de animación de Liadrin: «Todo lo sagrado» | WoW: Midnight | Cinemática de la historia
es-ES.description:
La esperanza amanecerá de nuevo. Durante su vida, Liadrin ha visto que su fe en la Luz pasaba por pruebas que pocos habrían superado, pero ha acabado por convertirse en una de las protectoras más firmes de La Fuente del Sol a lo largo de toda su historia de pérdidas, desesperación y reprensión. Ahora, en los momentos más difíciles para Azeroth, se planta ante el Vacío sabiendo que, con la Luz a su lado, la oscuridad jamás vencerá.

Ha llegado el momento de mantenerse firme.

it.title: Corto animato di Liadrin: Tutto ciò che è sacro | World of Warcraft: Midnight | Filmato della storia
it.description:
La speranza sorgerà di nuovo. Nel corso della sua vita, Liadrin ha visto la propria fede nella Luce messa alla prova in modi che pochi avrebbero sopportato; eppure, tramite un cammino di perdita, disperazione e castigo, è diventata la più animosa protettrice del Pozzo Solare. Ora, nel momento più buio di Azeroth, si schiera contro il Vuoto, consapevole del fatto che, con la Luce al suo fianco, l'oscurità non potrà vincere.

ko.description:
희망의 여명은 다시 찾아옵니다. 리아드린은 평생 살아오며 범인은 생각도 못 할 방식으로 빛에 대한 믿음을 시험받아 왔습니다. 그렇지만 상실과 절망, 응징의 여정을 거치며 누구보다 굳건한 태양샘의 수호자로 거듭났죠. 아제로스 역사가 시작된 이래 가장 암담한 시기를 맞은 지금, 리아드린은 빛이 자신과 함께하며, 어둠은 승리하지 못한다는 걸 알고 공허에 맞서고 있습니다.

지금이야말로 굳건히 맞서 싸울 때입니다. 

► Battle.net에서 한밤 신화 에디션 구매하기: https://kr.shop.battle.net/ko-kr/product/world-of-warcraft-midnight?pfm=rec-recommended

► WoW 구독: http://blizz.ly/WoWYTSub

--Socials--

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: I Got INFINITE LUCK In Survive Lava For Brainrots..
snippet.description:
Today I started over in survive lava for brainrots but I used max luck! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens. 

FOLTYN MERCH: https://foltyn.shop/

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Fixing The Worst Heavy Tank
snippet.description:
The British Conqueror is, in my opinion, one of the worst heavy tanks in War Thunder. It has an incredibly long reload for an APDS round that sometimes shatters or does not damage. The Caernarvon heavy tank fixes this by replacing the turret with that of a Centurion, giving it a much faster reload and a better selection of rounds.

Check the channel "About" section for the link to the creator of my profile picture.

Songs used (in order from first to last):
Various Halo Soundtracks

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/spookston

#warthundertanks #warthunder​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ #warthundergameplay
Fixing The Worst Heavy Tank

snippet.title: MELTED CHOCOLATE Rises Every Minute in Minecraft
snippet.description:
🍫 THE FLOOR IS MELTED CHOCOLATE! Can Milo and Chip build a candy home to survive the chocolate rising?!

✅ HOW TO PLAY MINECRAFT WITH CHIP AND MILO
1. Open Minecraft
2. Click "Play"
3. Click the "Servers" tab
4. Click "Add Server" 
5. Type in the IP: play.eyserver.com
6. Type in the Port: 19132
7. Click "Join"
You can join this server on Bedrock Edition (Phones, Consoles and Tablets) and Java Edition (PC and Mac)

#minecraft #minecraftbuild #miloandchip

snippet.title: Abrí una TIENDA ELEMENTAL en Minecraft!
snippet.description:
Hoy, Nacho tiene una tienda elemental y se ríe de sus amigos, por eso Dagar construye su propia tienda de elementos para darle una lección! ¿Qué pasará? ¡Descúbrelo!


#Minecraft #MinecraftMod #Dagar #NachoyDagar

#Minecraft #MinecraftMod #Dagar #NachoyDagar

hi.title: Minecraft लेकिन मैंने एक ELEMENTAL STORE खोला!
hi.description: आज, Nacho के पास एक तत्वों की दुकान है और वह अपने दोस्तों का मज़ाक उड़ा रहा है, इसलिए Dagar उसे सबक सिखाने के लिए अपनी खुद की दुकान बनाता है! क्या होगा? जानने के लिए देखें!

ar.title: ماينكرافت ولكن فتحت متجر العناصر السحرية!
ar.description: اليوم، ناتشو يمتلك متجراً للعناصر ويسخر من أصدقائه، ولهذا السبب قام داغار ببناء متجر العناصر الخاص به ليلقنه درساً! ماذا سيحدث؟ اكتشف ذلك الآن!

tr.title: Minecraft Ama ELEMENT MAĞAZASI Açtım!
tr.description: Bugün, Nacho'nun bir element mağazası var ve arkadaşlarıyla dalga geçiyor, bu yüzden Dagar ona bir ders vermek için kendi element mağazasını inşa ediyor! Neler olacak? İzleyin ve görün!

pl.title: Minecraft, ale otworzyłem SKLEP Z ŻYWIOŁAMI!
pl.description: Dzisiaj Nacho ma sklep z żywiołami i naśmiewa się z przyjaciół, więc Dagar buduje własny sklep, aby dać mu nauczkę! Co się stanie? Przekonajcie się sami!

ru.title: Майнкрафт, но я открыл ЭЛЕМЕНТАЛЬНЫЙ МАГАЗИН!
ru.description: Сегодня у Начо есть магазин элементов, и он смеется над своими друзьями, поэтому Дагар строит свой собственный магазин элементов, чтобы преподать ему урок! Что же произойдет? Узнайте в этом видео!

es.title: Abrí una TIENDA ELEMENTAL en Minecraft!
es.description:
Hoy, Nacho tiene una tienda elemental y se ríe de sus amigos, por eso Dagar construye su propia tienda de elementos para darle una lección! ¿Qué pasará? ¡Descúbrelo!


#Minecraft #MinecraftMod #Dagar #NachoyDagar

pt.title: Minecraft, Mas Eu Abri uma LOJA ELEMENTAL!
pt.description: Hoje, o Nacho tem uma loja de elementos e está a gozar com os amigos, por isso o Dagar constrói a sua própria loja para lhe dar uma lição! O que vai acontecer? Descobre agora!

id.title: Minecraft, Tapi Aku Buka TOKO ELEMEN!
id.description: Hari ini, Nacho punya toko elemen dan menertawakan teman-temannya, karena itu Dagar membangun toko elemennya sendiri untuk memberinya pelajaran! Apa yang akan terjadi? Tonton sampai habis!

de.title: Minecraft, aber ich eröffne einen ELEMENT-LADEN!
de.description: Heute besitzt Nacho einen Element-Laden und macht sich über seine Freunde lustig. Deshalb baut Dagar seinen eigenen Laden für Elemente, um ihm eine Lektion zu erteilen! Was wird wohl passieren? Finde es heraus!

snippet.title: This Mod Breaks People
snippet.description:
Today I beat the hardest Cuphead mod ever created, Cupagoovno. Every boss is changed to be much more difficult, so this took a lot of persistence. Yeah my sanity definitely struggled during some of these bosses

Check out the mod creator's channel here: https://www.youtube.com/@WaffelInteractive
And get the mod here: https://gamebanana.com/mods/534244

I was also inspired by @Soapyyyy and @fintan0694's videos to play this mod, so check out them for some more great content.

And finally, whenever I was struggling with a certain boss I would look up a few videos on youtube to see what other people did for them, and take strategies that I thought were good from them. Two great speedrunners that played this before are @Grondious and @Jason2890. And a great channel that has s-ranked every boss is @rogaliik 

Check out the new merch: https://eazyspeezy.com
My 2nd channel (WEEKLY UPLOADS): https://www.youtube.com/eaziestspeezy

Watch the world record speedrun here: this one is not a speedrun and I don't think anyone has done a run yet? not completely sure though
Here is the full King Dice fight: https://youtu.be/7KvFbVXXAmc

My channel generally focuses on a more casual side of speedruns. With these videos I want to show off cool speedruns, explain how they work, and entertain. Hopefully you enjoy the content and maybe even take up speedrunning yourself, because it is truly a lot of fun!

#EazySpeezy #Cuphead #Speedrun

snippet.title: Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 | Full Game Walkthrough | No Commentary
snippet.description:
The wait is finally over and the fifth chapter of the popular Poppy Playtime series has been released. In Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 we continue the story and find ourselves face to face with Huggy Wuggy again. We head deeper into the facility and meet various new mascots like Giblet, Lily Lovebraids and the long awaited reveal of The Prototype. 
The game looks gorgeous and the story and lore elements are fantastic with some great moments and awesome twists and turns. I particularly adore how much love Huggy Wuggy gets in this chapter as previously he only appeared shortly in the first game. The animations are also very much improved and cutscenes including characters like Giblet are very high quality.
In terms of gameplay there are a lot of new mechanics including a pressure gove and a glove that lets you use various elements. Some of the puzzles early on do drag a bit too long for me and have you simply switch levers over and over again which I feel was a step back compared to the previous chapters. Highlights in terms of gameplay are the dollhouse where you get to explore an amazing environment and most of the chase sequences were great and epic. It definitely is a step up compared to chapter 4, but chapter 3 is still my personal favorite.

#poppyplaytimechapter5 #poppyplaytime5 #poppyplaytime #mobentertainment #mascothorror #huggywuggy #kissymissy #horrorgames #horrorgame

snippet.title: Making Peace on the Lifesteal SMP...
snippet.description:
GET THE POSTCARD: https://sb737.store/products/signed-lifesteal-postcard

Is it time to make peace on the Lifesteal SMP? 

►LIFESTEAL MERCH: https://lifesteal.shop

All streamed live on Twitch: http://twitch.tv/SB737

What is lifesteal?
Lifesteal SMP is a private SMP, with a bunch of YouTubers. The nearly unstructured nature of the server makes it quite dangerous, and it is often dubbed “The Deadliest Minecraft SMP”. But there’s one more thing that makes it deadly. If you die, you lose a heart. If you kill someone, you gain a heart. If you get to zero hearts, you are banned from the server until someone revives you, but not everyone is so quick to revive the dead.

►MERCH -
https://sb737.store/

►Watch me stream Minecraft LIVE - 
http://twitch.tv/SB737

►Become a Channel Member - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFrVj6wBM42y3XuKCAj8n5A/join

snippet.title: What Was Nintendo Thinking?
snippet.description:
Mario Tennis Fever is Here! But WHAT was nintendo Thinking!? They made a brand new game for the nintendo switch 2 put mario on it and then made it this competitive with so many different rackets? Yeah I think this game is trying to take me out bro

Follow me on twitter: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
Follow me on twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

If you enjoyed the video make sure to hit the like button and subscribe! Feel free to share the video with anybody else you feel would enjoy it!

te.title: నింటెండో ఏమి ఆలోచిస్తున్నాడు?
te.description:
మారియో టెన్నిస్ ఫీవర్ వచ్చేసింది! కానీ నింటెండో ఏం ఆలోచిస్తోంది!? వాళ్ళు నింటెండో స్విచ్ 2 కోసం ఒక కొత్త గేమ్ తయారు చేసి, దానిపై మారియోను ఉంచి, ఆపై చాలా విభిన్నమైన రాకెట్లతో దీన్ని ఇంత పోటీగా మార్చారా? అవును, ఈ గేమ్ నన్ను బయటకు తీసుకెళ్లడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తోందని నేను అనుకుంటున్నాను బ్రో

ట్విట్టర్‌లో నన్ను ఫాలో అవ్వండి: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
ట్విచ్‌లో నన్ను ఫాలో అవ్వండి: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

మీరు వీడియోను ఆస్వాదించినట్లయితే, లైక్ బటన్‌ను నొక్కి, సబ్‌స్క్రైబ్ చేసుకోండి! మీరు దీన్ని ఆస్వాదిస్తారని భావించే ఎవరితోనైనా వీడియోను షేర్ చేయడానికి సంకోచించకండి!

ta.title: நிண்டெண்டோ என்ன நினைத்துக் கொண்டிருந்தது?
ta.description:
மரியோ டென்னிஸ் ஃபீவர் வந்துவிட்டது! ஆனா நிண்டெண்டோ என்ன யோசிச்சுட்டு இருந்தாங்க!? நிண்டெண்டோ ஸ்விட்ச் 2-க்கு ஒரு புது கேமை உருவாக்கினாங்க, மரியோவை போட்டு, அப்புறம் நிறைய வித்தியாசமான ராக்கெட்டுகளைப் பயன்படுத்தி இதை இவ்வளவு போட்டித்தன்மையா மாற்றியிருக்காங்க? ஆமா, இந்த கேம் என்னை வெளியே கொண்டு போக முயற்சிக்குதுன்னு நினைக்கிறேன் சகோ

ட்விட்டரில் என்னைப் பின்தொடருங்கள்: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
ட்விச்சில் என்னைப் பின்தொடருங்கள்: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

வீடியோ உங்களுக்குப் பிடிச்சிருந்தா லைக் பட்டனை அழுத்தி சப்ஸ்கிரைப் பண்ணுங்க! வீடியோவை நீங்க ரசிக்கிற வேற யாருடனும் ஷேர் பண்ணுங்க!

bn.title: নিন্টেন্ডো কী ভাবছিল?
bn.description:
মারিও টেনিস জ্বর এসে গেছে! কিন্তু নিন্টেন্ডো কি ভাবছিল!? তারা নিন্টেন্ডো সুইচ ২ এর জন্য একটি নতুন গেম তৈরি করেছে, মারিওকে লাগিয়েছে এবং তারপর এতগুলো র‍্যাকেট দিয়ে এটিকে এত প্রতিযোগিতামূলক করে তুলেছে? হ্যাঁ, আমার মনে হয় এই গেমটি আমাকে বাইরে নিয়ে যাওয়ার চেষ্টা করছে ভাই

টুইটারে আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
টুইচ-এ আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

ভিডিওটি যদি আপনার ভালো লেগে থাকে তাহলে লাইক বাটনে ক্লিক করে সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন! ভিডিওটি অন্য কারো সাথে শেয়ার করতে দ্বিধা করবেন না, আপনার যদি ভালো লাগে!

ml.title: നിന്റെൻഡോ എന്താണ് ചിന്തിച്ചിരുന്നത്?
ml.description:
മാരിയോ ടെന്നീസ് പനി ഇതാ വന്നിരിക്കുന്നു! പക്ഷേ നിന്റെൻഡോ എന്താണ് ചിന്തിച്ചിരുന്നത്!? അവർ നിന്റെൻഡോ സ്വിച്ച് 2-നായി ഒരു പുതിയ ഗെയിം ഉണ്ടാക്കി, അതിൽ മാരിയോ ഇട്ടു, എന്നിട്ട് ഇത്രയധികം വ്യത്യസ്ത റാക്കറ്റുകൾ ഉപയോഗിച്ച് ഇത് ഇത്രയും മത്സരാത്മകമാക്കി? അതെ, ഈ ഗെയിം എന്നെ പുറത്താക്കാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുകയാണെന്ന് ഞാൻ കരുതുന്നു സഹോദരാ

ട്വിറ്ററിൽ എന്നെ പിന്തുടരുക: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
ട്വിറ്റിൽ എന്നെ പിന്തുടരുക: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

വീഡിയോ ആസ്വദിച്ചെങ്കിൽ ലൈക്ക് ബട്ടൺ അമർത്തി സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്യുന്നത് ഉറപ്പാക്കുക! നിങ്ങൾക്ക് ഇഷ്ടപ്പെടുമെന്ന് തോന്നുന്ന മറ്റാരെങ്കിലുമായി വീഡിയോ പങ്കിടാൻ മടിക്കേണ്ട!

ja.title: 任天堂は何を考えていたのか?
ja.description:
マリオテニスフィーバーが来た！でも任天堂は一体何を考えていたんだ！Nintendo Switch 2向けにマリオを完全新作にして、しかもこんなにたくさんのラケットで対戦できるゲームにしたのか！このゲームは俺を倒そうとしているんじゃないか？

Twitterでフォローしてください：https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
Twitchでフォローしてください：https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

この動画が気に入ったら、ぜひ「いいね！」と「チャンネル登録」をお願いします！この動画を楽しんでくれそうな人とも気軽にシェアしてください！

pl.title: Co Nintendo miało na myśli?
pl.description:
Gorączka tenisowa Mario już tu jest! Ale CO Nintendo sobie myślało!? Stworzyli zupełnie nową grę na Nintendo Switch, dodali do niej Mario, a potem zrobili ją tak konkurencyjną, z tyloma różnymi rakietami? Tak, myślę, że ta gra próbuje mnie wykończyć, stary.

Obserwuj mnie na Twitterze: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
Obserwuj mnie na Twitchu: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

Jeśli podobał Ci się film, koniecznie kliknij przycisk „Lubię to” i zasubskrybuj! Możesz udostępnić film każdemu, kto Twoim zdaniem mógłby się nim zainteresować!

en.title: What Was Nintendo Thinking?
en.description:
Mario Tennis Fever is Here! But WHAT was nintendo Thinking!? They made a brand new game for the nintendo switch 2 put mario on it and then made it this competitive with so many different rackets? Yeah I think this game is trying to take me out bro

Follow me on twitter: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
Follow me on twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

If you enjoyed the video make sure to hit the like button and subscribe! Feel free to share the video with anybody else you feel would enjoy it!

es-US.title: ¿Qué estaba pensando Nintendo?
es-US.description:
¡Llegó la fiebre del tenis de Mario! ¿Pero en qué estaba pensando Nintendo? ¿Crearon un juego completamente nuevo para Nintendo Switch 2, le pusieron Mario y lo hicieron tan competitivo con tantas raquetas diferentes? Sí, creo que este juego me está machacando, hermano.

Sígueme en Twitter: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
Sígueme en Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

Si te gustó el video, ¡dale a "Me gusta" y suscríbete! ¡Compártelo con quien creas que le guste!

id.title: Apa yang dipikirkan Nintendo?
id.description:
Demam Mario Tennis telah tiba! Tapi apa yang dipikirkan Nintendo!? Mereka membuat game baru untuk Nintendo Switch, memasukkan Mario ke dalamnya, dan kemudian membuatnya sangat kompetitif dengan begitu banyak raket yang berbeda? Ya, kurasa game ini mencoba mengalahkanku, bro!

Ikuti aku di Twitter: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
Ikuti aku di Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

Jika Anda menikmati video ini, pastikan untuk menekan tombol suka dan berlangganan! Jangan ragu untuk membagikan video ini kepada siapa pun yang menurut Anda akan menyukainya!

it.title: Cosa stava pensando Nintendo?
it.description:
È arrivata la febbre del tennis per Mario! Ma COSA pensava Nintendo!? Hanno creato un gioco completamente nuovo per Nintendo Switch 2, ci hanno messo Mario e poi lo hanno reso così competitivo con così tante racchette diverse? Sì, credo che questo gioco stia cercando di farmi fuori, amico.

Seguimi su Twitter: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
Seguimi su Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

Se il video ti è piaciuto, metti "Mi piace" e iscriviti! Sentiti libero di condividere il video con chiunque pensi possa apprezzarlo!

nl-NL.title: Wat dacht Nintendo hierbij?
nl-NL.description:
Mario Tennis Fever is gearriveerd! Maar wat dacht Nintendo nou?! Ze hebben een gloednieuwe game gemaakt voor de Nintendo Switch 2, Mario erin gestopt en het vervolgens zo competitief gemaakt met zoveel verschillende rackets? Ja, ik denk dat deze game me probeert te verslaan, man.

Volg me op Twitter: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
Volg me op Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

Als je de video leuk vond, druk dan op de like-knop en abonneer je! Deel de video gerust met iedereen die hem ook leuk zou vinden!

iw.title: מה נינטנדו חשבה לעצמה?
iw.description:
מריו טניס קדחת כאן! אבל על מה נינטנדו חשבה!? הם יצרו משחק חדש לגמרי לנינטנדו סוויץ' 2, שמו עליו את מריו ואז הפכו אותו לתחרותי כל כך עם כל כך הרבה מחבטים שונים? כן, אני חושב שהמשחק הזה מנסה להוציא אותי משליטה אחי.

עקבו אחריי בטוויטר: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
עקבו אחריי בטוויץ': https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

אם נהניתם מהסרטון, הקפידו ללחוץ על כפתור הלייק ולהירשם! אל תהססו לשתף את הסרטון עם כל מי שאתם חושבים שייהנה ממנו!

hi.title: निंटेंडो क्या सोच रहा था?
hi.description:
मारियो टेनिस का बुखार चढ़ गया है! लेकिन निन्टेंडो ने आखिर सोचा क्या था!? उन्होंने निन्टेंडो स्विच 2 के लिए एक नया गेम बनाया, उसमें मारियो को डाल दिया और फिर इतने अलग-अलग रैकेट के साथ इसे इतना प्रतिस्पर्धी बना दिया? लगता है ये गेम मुझे हराना चाहता है यार।

मुझे ट्विटर पर फॉलो करें: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
मुझे ट्विच पर फॉलो करें: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

अगर आपको वीडियो पसंद आया तो लाइक बटन दबाना और सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें! वीडियो को उन लोगों के साथ शेयर करें जिन्हें लगता है कि उन्हें भी यह पसंद आएगा!

fr-FR.title: À quoi pensait Nintendo ?
fr-FR.description:
Mario Tennis Fever est arrivé ! Mais à quoi pensait Nintendo ?! Ils ont créé un tout nouveau jeu pour la Nintendo Switch 2, y ont intégré Mario et l'ont rendu aussi compétitif avec autant de raquettes différentes ? Franchement, je crois que ce jeu essaie de me mettre KO !

Suivez-moi sur Twitter : https://twitter.com/DotoDoya

Suivez-moi sur Twitch : https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

Si la vidéo vous a plu, n'hésitez pas à liker et à vous abonner ! Partagez-la avec tous ceux qui pourraient l'apprécier !

ar.title: ما الذي كان يدور في ذهن نينتندو؟
ar.description:
حمى ماريو تنس هنا! لكن ما الذي كان يدور في ذهن نينتندو؟! لقد صنعوا لعبة جديدة كليًا لجهاز نينتندو سويتش 2، ووضعوا ماريو عليها، ثم جعلوها تنافسية للغاية مع كل هذه المضارب المختلفة؟ أجل، أعتقد أن هذه اللعبة تحاول إقصائي يا أخي!

تابعني على تويتر: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya

تابعني على تويتش: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

إذا أعجبك الفيديو، لا تنسَ الضغط على زر الإعجاب والاشتراك! شارك الفيديو مع أي شخص تعتقد أنه سيستمتع به!

pa.title: ਨਿਨਟੈਂਡੋ ਕੀ ਸੋਚ ਰਿਹਾ ਸੀ?
pa.description:
ਮਾਰੀਓ ਟੈਨਿਸ ਬੁਖਾਰ ਆ ਗਿਆ ਹੈ! ਪਰ ਨਿਨਟੈਂਡੋ ਕੀ ਸੋਚ ਰਿਹਾ ਸੀ!? ਉਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਨੇ ਨਿਨਟੈਂਡੋ ਸਵਿੱਚ 2 ਲਈ ਇੱਕ ਬਿਲਕੁਲ ਨਵੀਂ ਗੇਮ ਬਣਾਈ, ਜਿਸ ਵਿੱਚ ਮਾਰੀਓ ਲਗਾਇਆ ਗਿਆ ਅਤੇ ਫਿਰ ਇਸਨੂੰ ਇੰਨੇ ਸਾਰੇ ਵੱਖ-ਵੱਖ ਰੈਕੇਟਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਇੰਨਾ ਮੁਕਾਬਲਾਤਮਕ ਬਣਾਇਆ? ਹਾਂ ਮੈਨੂੰ ਲੱਗਦਾ ਹੈ ਕਿ ਇਹ ਗੇਮ ਮੈਨੂੰ ਬਾਹਰ ਕੱਢਣ ਦੀ ਕੋਸ਼ਿਸ਼ ਕਰ ਰਹੀ ਹੈ ਭਰਾ

ਟਵਿੱਟਰ 'ਤੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਾਲਣ ਕਰੋ: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
ਟਵਿੱਚ 'ਤੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਾਲਣ ਕਰੋ: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

ਜੇਕਰ ਤੁਹਾਨੂੰ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਪਸੰਦ ਆਇਆ ਹੈ ਤਾਂ ਲਾਈਕ ਬਟਨ ਨੂੰ ਦਬਾਓ ਅਤੇ ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰੋ! ਵੀਡੀਓ ਨੂੰ ਕਿਸੇ ਹੋਰ ਨਾਲ ਸਾਂਝਾ ਕਰਨ ਲਈ ਬੇਝਿਜਕ ਮਹਿਸੂਸ ਕਰੋ ਜਿਸਨੂੰ ਤੁਸੀਂ ਮਹਿਸੂਸ ਕਰਦੇ ਹੋ ਕਿ ਇਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦ ਲਓਗੇ!

ru.title: О чём думала компания Nintendo?
ru.description:
Теннисная лихорадка Марио в самом разгаре! Но о чём вообще думала Nintendo?! Они выпустили совершенно новую игру для Nintendo Switch 2, добавили Марио и сделали её такой соревновательной, с таким количеством разных ракеток? Да, кажется, эта игра пытается меня убить, чувак!

Подписывайтесь на меня в Твиттере: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
Подписывайтесь на меня в Твиттере: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

Если вам понравилось видео, обязательно поставьте лайк и подпишитесь! Не стесняйтесь делиться видео с теми, кому оно, по вашему мнению, тоже понравится!

uk.title: Про що думала Nintendo?
uk.description:
Тенісна лихоманка Маріо вже тут! Але ПРО ЩО думала Nintendo!? Вони створили абсолютно нову гру для Nintendo Switch 2, поставили Маріо, а потім зробили її такою конкурентною з такою кількістю різних ракеток? Так, я думаю, що ця гра намагається мене вибити, бро.

Підпишіться на мене в Twitter: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
Підпишіться на мене в Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

Якщо вам сподобалося відео, обов'язково натисніть кнопку "лайк" і підпишіться! Не соромтеся ділитися відео з ким завгодно, кому, на вашу думку, воно може сподобатися!

ko.title: 닌텐도는 도대체 무슨 생각을 한 걸까?
ko.description:
마리오 테니스 열풍이 불고 있어요! 그런데 닌텐도는 대체 무슨 생각을 한 걸까요?! 닌텐도 스위치 2용으로 완전히 새로운 게임을 만들어서 마리오를 집어넣고, 게다가 이렇게 다양한 라켓까지 있는 경쟁 게임으로 만들었다니? 이 게임, 저를 완전히 압도하려는 것 같아요!

트위터 팔로우: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
트위치 팔로우: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

영상이 마음에 드셨다면 좋아요와 구독 부탁드립니다! 주변에 재밌게 보실 만한 분들과도 공유해 주세요!

pt-BR.title: O que a Nintendo estava pensando?
pt-BR.description:
Mario Tennis Fever chegou! Mas o que a Nintendo estava pensando?! Criaram um jogo totalmente novo para o Nintendo Switch, colocaram o Mario nele e o tornaram tão competitivo com tantas raquetes diferentes? É, acho que esse jogo está tentando me derrotar, cara!

Siga-me no Twitter: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
Siga-me na Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

Se você gostou do vídeo, não se esqueça de curtir e se inscrever! Compartilhe o vídeo com quem você achar que também vai gostar!

de-DE.title: Was hat sich Nintendo dabei nur gedacht?
de-DE.description:
Mario Tennis ist da! Aber was hat sich Nintendo dabei nur gedacht?! Sie haben ein brandneues Spiel für die Nintendo Switch 2 entwickelt, Mario draufgepackt und es dann mit so vielen verschiedenen Schlägern so kompetitiv gestaltet? Mann, ich glaube, dieses Spiel will mich fertigmachen!

Folgt mir auf Twitter: https://twitter.com/DotoDoya
Folgt mir auf Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/dotodoya

Wenn euch das Video gefallen hat, lasst ein Like da und abonniert meinen Kanal! Teilt das Video gerne mit allen, denen es auch gefallen könnte!
